title: geraniospermum incisum
intro: Geraniospermum incisum, also known as the incised geraniospermum, is a plant species belonging to the family Menispermaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been found to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Geraniospermum incisum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
